title: Kado - Buying Power
description: what is "Buying Power" and how do I increase it?

actions.value:
Buying or Selling Power is how Kado refers to their crypto purchasing/selling limits. Each pay method has its own power, and has a 24-hour recovery time. So if you are seeing an "insufficient power" message, you can try reducing the amount of the order, waiting 1 day for your limits to reset, or changing the payment or payout method.

 

To learn more about buying/selling power and how to request an increase, please see this page: https://faq.kado.money/en/article/what-is-buying-power-and-how-do-i-increase-it-1nwii71
